The '''''Razor''-class starfighter''' was a product of [[Starypan/SunHui Spaceworks]], manufactured shortly before [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan's]] destruction. It was meant to succeed the [[R-41 Starchaser]] and was used by many corporate security forces, including the [[Viraxo]] family, as it was cheap and reliable.

==Characteristics==
The craft had shields, a hyperdrive, wingtip dual lasers, dual [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] on the nose, and two launchers which carried four [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] each. It was average in combat, as the shielding was fairly poor for a craft of its size. The saving grace of the Razor was a good top speed with which to escape from its enemies.

{{Ship-stub}}

[[File:Kimogila-razor-recg.jpg|thumb|left|Two ''Razor''-class starfighters attacking a [[M12-L Kimogila heavy fighter]].]]
